com.github.dakusui.pcond.provider

Interface AssertionProviderBase<AE extends Exception>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    AssertionProvider<AE>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    DefaultAssertionProvider

    public interface AssertionProviderBase<AE extends Exception>
extends AssertionProvider<AE>

      • Methods inherited from interface com.github.dakusui.pcond.provider.AssertionProvider

        createAssertionProvider

    • Method Detail

      • requireNonNull

        default <T> T requireNonNull(T value)
        Description copied from interface: AssertionProvider

        Checks a value if it is null or not. If it is not a null, this method returns the given value itself.

        Specified by:
        requireNonNull in interface AssertionProvider<AE extends Exception>
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The given value.
        Returns:
        The value.

      • requireArgument

        default <T> T requireArgument(T value,
                              Predicate<? super T> cond)
        Description copied from interface: AssertionProvider

        Checks a value if it meets a requirement specified by cond. If it does, the value itself will be returned.

        Specified by:
        requireArgument in interface AssertionProvider<AE extends Exception>
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The value to be checked.
        cond - The requirement to check the value.
        Returns:
        The value.

      • requireState

        default <T> T requireState(T value,
                           Predicate<? super T> cond)
        Description copied from interface: AssertionProvider

        Checks a value if it meets a requirement specified by cond. If it does, the value itself will be returned.

        Specified by:
        requireState in interface AssertionProvider<AE extends Exception>
        Type Parameters:
        T - The type of the value.
        Parameters:
        value - The value to be checked.
        cond - The requirement to check the value.
        Returns:
        The value.
